Afi Sandals Alpha.description: Flamefete Ticket leg armor. They dance breezily in the midsummer heat, sending prayers with every step and twirl.

Ajarakan Greaves.description: Flame crested Ajarakan leg armor. A heat so fierce that each step makes the earth shudder in agony.

Ajarakan Greaves Alpha.description: Flame crested Ajarakan leg armor. A heat so fierce that each step makes the earth shudder in agony.

Ajarakan Greaves Beta.description: Flame crested Ajarakan leg armor. A heat so fierce that each step makes the earth shudder in agony.

Alloy Greaves.description: Leg armor crafted from quality ore. What it lacks in charm it more than makes up in defense.

Alloy Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor crafted from quality ore. What it lacks in charm it more than makes up in defense.

Arkvulcan Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor made from Arkveld spoils. No bloody war nor bitter loss could halt the knight's march to victory.

Arkvulcan Greaves Beta.description: Leg armor made from Arkveld spoils. No bloody war nor bitter loss could halt the knight's march to victory.

Artian Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor made from eldritch scraps. Wearing it bestows tremendous power.

Azuz Pants Alpha.description: Legwear worn in the village of the Everforge. The rubbery, oil-based material is completely waterproof.

Balahara Greaves.description: Spiny Balahara leg armor. The carapace has been split into clever, fluid parts.

Balahara Greaves Alpha.description: Spiny Balahara leg armor. The carapace has been split into clever, fluid parts.

Balahara Greaves Beta.description: Spiny Balahara leg armor. The carapace has been split into clever, fluid parts.

Bale Sollerets Alpha.description: Leg armor worn by a dark knight. Shadowy proof of those who protect others even at their own expense.

Barina Greaves.description: Lala Barina leg armor. Pulls the rose motif back in with subtle but elegant detailing.

Barina Greaves Alpha.description: Lala Barina leg armor. Pulls the rose motif back in with subtle but elegant detailing.

Barina Greaves Beta.description: Lala Barina leg armor. Pulls the rose motif back in with subtle but elegant detailing.

Battle Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor designed for seasoned hunters. No compromises were made for this sought-after masterpiece.

Blango Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor made from Blangonga spoils. The striking, exotic shapes draw from Far Eastern ritual garb.

Blango Greaves Beta.description: Leg armor made from Blangonga spoils. The striking, exotic shapes draw from Far Eastern ritual garb.

Blossom Boots Alpha.description: Blossom Ticket leg armor. Elegant footwear that's perfectly suited for a spring celebration.

Bone Greaves.description: Traditional leg armor crafted from monster bones so light it's like wearing nothing at all.

Bone Greaves Alpha.description: Traditional leg armor crafted from monster bones so light it's like wearing nothing at all.

Butterfly Crura Alpha.description: Dazzling armor made from insect parts. Its light weight and color are proof of one's class.

Ceremonial Greaves Alpha.description: Lumenhymn Ticket leg armor. Softly they walk, a wordless reminder of the splendor of winter.

Chainmail Pants.description: Leg armor made of woven chain links. The clever weave prevents it from impairing movement.

Chainmail Pants Alpha.description: Leg armor made of woven chain links. The clever weave prevents it from impairing movement.

Chatacabra Greaves.description: Leg armor made from Chatacabra spoils. A loose fit for maximum mobility.

Chatacabra Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor made from Chatacabra spoils. A loose fit for maximum mobility.

Chatacabra Greaves Beta.description: Leg armor made from Chatacabra spoils. A loose fit for maximum mobility.

Clerk Shoes Alpha.description: Grand Hub handler leg armor. Designed to help the wearer stand for hours on end without getting sore feet.

Commission Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor worn by hunters on an expedition to the New World. Sturdily made.

Conga Greaves.description: Greaves made of Congalala parts. Wild crafting perfect for those who run in the wilderness.

Conga Greaves Alpha.description: Greaves made of Congalala parts. Wild crafting perfect for those who run in the wilderness.

Conga Greaves Beta.description: Greaves made of Congalala parts. Wild crafting perfect for those who run in the wilderness.

Dahaad Shardgreaves Alpha.description: Jin Dahaad leg armor. Every footfall coats the earth in spiderwebs of ice.

Dahaad Shardgreaves Beta.description: Jin Dahaad leg armor. Every footfall coats the earth in spiderwebs of ice.

Dahaad Shardgreaves Gamma.description: Leg armor made from special Jin Dahaad materials. The shining white greaves evoke the autonomy of the Arch-tempered.

Damascus Greaves Alpha.description: This legendary steel armor is said to lead its wearer down the conqueror's path.

Death Stench Heel Alpha.description: Modeled on the god of death. Hearing the black footsteps means your time has come.

Demon Pants Alpha.description: Pants worn by a demon of combat who treads through even the holiest of domains. (Full Armor Set)

Diver's Boots Alpha.description: Diving Ticket leg armor. Footwear that lets you move so fast underwater, your hunts will never go belly up.

Dober Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor fashioned from obsidian bone of unknown provenance. It resembles an all-powerful monster.

Doshaguma Greaves.description: Doshaguma leg armor. Whether dune or sandstorm, nothing can slow its wearer's progress.

Doshaguma Greaves Alpha.description: Doshaguma leg armor. Whether dune or sandstorm, nothing can slow its wearer's progress.

Doshaguma Greaves Beta.description: Doshaguma leg armor. Whether dune or sandstorm, nothing can slow its wearer's progress.

Dreamwalker Greaves Alpha.description: Dreamspell Ticket leg armor. The sound of wandering footsteps stirs the souls lost in the bitter autumn night.

Duna Wildgreaves.description: Elaborately patterned Uth Duna leg armor. The design is said to invoke the forest's protection.

Duna Wildgreaves Alpha.description: Elaborately patterned Uth Duna leg armor. The design is said to invoke the forest's protection.

Duna Wildgreaves Beta.description: Elaborately patterned Uth Duna leg armor. The design is said to invoke the forest's protection.

Duna Wildgreaves Gamma.description: Leg armor made from special Uth Duna materials. The vibrant patterns evoke the independence of the Arch-tempered.

Gajau Boots.description: Leg armor made from Gajau spoils. The pliable hide even has fans outside the hunter community.

Gajau Boots Alpha.description: Leg armor made from Gajau spoils. The pliable hide even has fans outside the hunter community.

Gogmazios Greaves Alpha.description: Gogmazios leg armor. From beneath the earth, it wells forth on a shadowy mission to devour the world.

Gogmazios Greaves Beta.description: Gogmazios leg armor. From beneath the earth, it wells forth on a shadowy mission to devour the world.

Gore Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor made from Gore Magala materials. Spirits you across hunting grounds as fast as the wind.

Gore Greaves Beta.description: Leg armor made from Gore Magala materials. Spirits you across hunting grounds as fast as the wind.

Gravios Greaves Alpha.description: Greaves made from Gravios parts. Tightly fastened to protect like a castle gate.

Gravios Greaves Beta.description: Greaves made from Gravios parts. Tightly fastened to protect like a castle gate.

Guild Ace Boots Alpha.description: Leg armor worn by an Astrum Unit hunter. The design was carefully calibrated to traverse any terrain.

Guild Cross Boots Alpha.description: Armor for Arena champions. Painstakingly made. For true heroes.

Gypceros Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor made from Gypceros spoils. The springy material is undeniably more comfortable than metal.

Gypceros Greaves Beta.description: Leg armor made from Gypceros spoils. The springy material is undeniably more comfortable than metal.

Harvest Raiz Alpha.description: Harvest Ticket leg armor. Spirits of the dead beneath the earth will warn the wearer of impending danger.

High Metal Greaves Alpha.description: Armor made from a generous portion of ore. Renowned for its ability to withstand monster attacks.

Hirabami Greaves.description: Leg armor made from Hirabami spoils. Designed for mobility, they feel like walking on wind.

Hirabami Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor made from Hirabami spoils. Designed for mobility, they feel like walking on wind.

Hirabami Greaves Beta.description: Leg armor made from Hirabami spoils. Designed for mobility, they feel like walking on wind.

Hope Greaves.description: Armor crafted specifically for members of the expedition. It can handle nearly any terrain.

Hope Greaves Alpha.description: Armor crafted specifically for members of the expedition. It can handle nearly any terrain.

Ingot Greaves.description: Leg armor fashioned from lustrous, golden ore. Clever smithing makes the metal feel fluid and light.

Ingot Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor fashioned from lustrous, golden ore. Clever smithing makes the metal feel fluid and light.

King Beetle Crura Alpha.description: Armor so perfect that one could get tread upon by a wyvern and not even flinch.

Kunafa Chaps Alpha.description: Leg armor worn in the Windsong Village. Handsome Dalthydon pelts keep the legs well protected.

Kut-Ku Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor made from Yian Kut-Ku spoils. The exceptional design prioritizes ease of movement.

Kut-Ku Greaves Beta.description: Leg armor made from Yian Kut-Ku spoils. The exceptional design prioritizes ease of movement.

Lagiacrus Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor made from Lagiacrus parts. It sharpens the wearer's senses and draws out latent abilities.

Leather Pants.description: Leg armor reinforced with monster hide. Molds to the body with extended use.

Leather Pants Alpha.description: Leg armor reinforced with monster hide. Molds to the body with extended use.

Melahoa Roots Alpha.description: Fragrant leg armor that could intoxicate even a wyvern with its sweet, wafting aroma.

Mizutsune Greaves Alpha.description: Mizutsune leg armor. Beautiful wedding footwear that features an enchanting split-toe design.

Mizutsune Greaves Beta.description: Mizutsune leg armor. Beautiful wedding footwear that features an enchanting split-toe design.

Nerscylla Greaves.description: Leg armor made from Nerscylla spoils. It keeps hunters light on their feet and looking good in action.

Nerscylla Greaves Beta.description: Leg armor made from Nerscylla spoils. It keeps hunters light on their feet and looking good in action.

Numinous Greaves Alpha.description: Leg armor imbued with Zoh Shia's soul. Denies its all-consuming thirst for extermination.

Omega Boots Alpha.description: Leg armor fashioned after the apex of autonomous weaponry. Their wearer's journey is eternal.

Orion Boots Alpha.description: Orion Ticket leg armor that's perfect for walking—nay, dancing and playing through snow and ice.

Piragill Greaves.description: Piragill leg armor. A light, skintight fit made with the most exquisite, buttery-soft leather.

Piragill Greaves Beta.description: Piragill leg armor. A light, skintight fit made with the most exquisite, buttery-soft leather.

Quematrice Greaves.description: Quematrice leg armor. The ornate gaiters let a hunter strut like a Quematrice.

Quematrice Greaves Beta.description: Quematrice leg armor. The ornate gaiters let a hunter strut like a Quematrice.

Rathalos Greaves Beta.description: Sturdy and supple, this Rathalos leg armor makes one as nimble as a fire wyvern mounting the skies.

Rathian Greaves Alpha.description: Imbued with the Queen of the Land's strength, this Rathian leg armor tames the ground at your feet.

Rey Sandgreaves.description: Rey Dau leg armor. A layer of latent electricity cushions blows and softens landings.

Sakuratide Hakama Alpha.description: Blossomdance Ticket leg armor. It embodies the allure of resplendent warriors from spring sunrises past.

Udra Miregreaves.description: Nu Udra leg armor. The wearer could cross a sea of fire without so much as a blister.
